invitation.cancel: Emitted when the form is cancelled
invitation.close: Emitted when the modal is closed (via close button, cancel, or click-out)
invitation.closeInvitation: Emitted when the invitation modal is closed
invitation.delete: Emitted when delete action is confirmed for an invitation
invitation.resend: Emitted when resend action is confirmed for an invitation
invitation.revoke: Emitted when revoke action is confirmed for an invitation
invitation.updateRequest: Emitted when table request parameters change (for server-side mode)
invitation.submitted: Emitted when the invitation is successfully submitted

invitation.appFilterOptions: Predefined filter options for the app column
invitation.apps: List of available applications for invitation
invitation.appSchema: Zod validation schema for app selection
invitation.columnsData: Custom column definitions to override default columns
invitation.dismissOnClickOut: Whether to close the modal when clicking outside
invitation.expiresAfterSchema: Zod validation schema for days-based expiration
invitation.expiresAtSchema: Zod validation schema for calendar-based expiration
invitation.expiryMode: Expiration input mode: calendar date picker or days input
invitation.id: Unique identifier for the table instance
invitation.initialSorting: Initial sorting state of the table
invitation.invitationData: Initial data to populate the form
invitation.invitations: Array of invitation data to display
invitation.isLoading: Show loading state while fetching invitations
invitation.isServerTable: Enable server-side pagination, filtering, and sorting
invitation.persistState: Persist table state (sorting, filters) across sessions
invitation.persistStateStorage: Storage type for persisting table state
invitation.roleFilterOptions: Predefined filter options for the role column
invitation.roles: List of available roles for invitation
invitation.roleSchema: Zod validation schema for role selection
invitation.showInviteAction: Show or hide the invite user button
invitation.statutsFilterOptions: Predefined filter options for the status column
invitation.submitLabel: Custom label for the submit button
invitation.tableOptions: Additional options to pass to the underlying Table component
invitation.title: Title text displayed in the modal header
invitation.totalRecords: Total number of records (for server-side pagination)
invitation.visibleColumns: Array of column keys to show/hide columns

subtitle.invitationForm: Invitation form is a comprehensive form component for sending user invitations with support for app selection, role assignment, and expiration settings.
subtitle.invitationModal: Invitation modal is a dialog component that wraps the invitation form in a modal overlay for sending user invitations.
subtitle.invitationTable: Invitation table is a comprehensive data table component for managing user invitations with filtering, sorting, actions, and an integrated invitation modal.
